name: ShoreTel, Inc.
description: ShoreTel, Inc. was a prominent telecommunications company that specialized in providing unified communications solutions for businesses, including IP phone systems, contact center software, and cloud-based communication services. Founded in 1996, the company focused on simplifying business communications through innovative, user-friendly technology. In September 2017, ShoreTel was acquired by Mitel Networks Corporation, a Canadian-based global leader in business communications. Following the acquisition, ShoreTel's product portfolio and technologies were integrated into Mitel's broader suite of communication and collaboration offerings, effectively ending ShoreTel's existence as an independent entity.
